Mark with an `x` all the checkboxes that apply (like `[x]`)

- [ ] Added tests (if necessary)
- [ ] Run tests
- [ ] Run formatting
- [ ] Evidence attached
- [ ] Commented the code

## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `test` — New or updated tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance
